name: Back injury at work but I fell from personal issue, covered in Utah?
description: Yes if work (hard floor) made fall injury worse per Utah law.

mainEntity.name: Back injury at work but I fell from personal issue, covered in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes if work (hard floor) made fall injury worse per Utah law.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Possibly, if work conditions worsened it like hard floor.**

Utah appeals clarify idiopathic falls compensable if job increased injury severity.[3]

- Prove employment aggravated risk.
- Medical on floor impact.
- Not just 'increased risk' but actual worse injury.

Attorney argues per Ackley case.[3] Viable for backs.
